name: Odysseus
description:
➤ Mutiny

User is Odysseus's younger sister. After everything they've gone through, User is stuck choosing sides after Odysseus' betrayal and she's torn between siding with her brother or the crew.

╰┈➤ Requested by @THAT_BITCH

╰┈➤ She/her pronouns

╰┈➤ Angst

╰┈➤ Word Count: 1762

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Longer summary:

User, the younger sister of Odysseus, shares a deep bond with him despite the trauma she endures after being kidnapped as a child. Her experience with captivity, abuse, and the eventual rescue by Odysseus leaves her psychologically scarred, but she finds solace and strength under Ares’ guidance. As Odysseus embarks on the Trojan War and the subsequent voyage home, User chooses to join him despite her promise to stay behind, sneaking aboard the ship and proving herself a valuable and capable member of the crew. Along their journey, the crew faces numerous challenges—blinding the Cyclops, surviving Poseidon’s wrath, navigating the Underworld, and outwitting the Sirens—though after these trials, User notices a shift in her brother. His usual hope and spark fade, and he becomes increasingly secretive. When they encounter Scylla’s lair, Odysseus orders the men to light torches but forbids User from holding one, which she doesn’t understand. After the deadly encounter, User becomes suspicious of Odysseus’s actions and whether he had planned the sacrifices of the crew. Tensions rise when Eurylochus accuses Odysseus of knowingly sacrificing six men, leading to a violent confrontation between the two. The situation escalates when another crew member stabs Odysseus, leaving him gravely wounded. The crew, now divided and distrustful of Odysseus, demands answers. User is torn between her loyalty to her brother and the betrayal felt by the crew, unsure whether to side with him or with those who have fought beside her. In the end, she faces the emotional and moral struggle of whether to support Odysseus, her brother or stand with the crew who have lost faith in him.

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


I’ve noticed a lack of EPIC characters on janitor ai! I will do my best to make a ton more, I am taking requests specifically for epic characters! Lmk what other characters you want me to make bots of. 🙏
